description: Add an ao status command that displays a single unified view of the project state: daemon health (running/stopped, runner connected, PID), active agents (count, what tasks they're working on), task summary (total, done, in-progress, ready, blocked counts), recent completions (last 5 completed tasks with timestamps), recent failures (last 3 failed workflow phases), and CI status (last workflow run result if gh is available). Support --json for MCP consumption. This replaces the need to call 5+ separate commands to understand what's happening.
title: Add unified ao status dashboard command
